conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For the new notification service we're deciding between Go, Rust, and Python.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My sister called to catch up, hadn't talked in a few weeks.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been trying a new recipe for meal prep this week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Python would be fastest to write but the throughput requirements here are pretty demanding.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been meaning to water the plants on my desk more consistently.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I finally organized the pile of mail that's been sitting on my counter.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Rust would give us the best performance ceiling but the team's Rust experience is basically zero.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The package I ordered got delayed by a couple of days.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to submit my expense report before the end of the month.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Go has a gentler learning curve than Rust and its concurrency model fits this kind of fan-out workload well.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My laptop update took forever to install last night.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Finally submitted the expense report, forgot two receipts and had to go back for them.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got a reminder that my credit card statement is due soon.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Prototyped the core loop in Go and the team picked it up within a couple days, way faster than I expected for a new language.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Still a little tempted by Rust's performance numbers from the benchmarks I read.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been meaning to reorganize the garage for weeks now.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The office is switching coffee vendors next month apparently.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Ran a load test on the Go prototype and the results came in well above what we actually need.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We're going with Go for the notification service. The team ramped up on it in days, and the load test comfortably cleared our throughput target.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'll start breaking the work into tickets this week.

query: What language did the team choose for the notification service?

answer_contains: team ramped up on it in days
